name: DCC plc
description: DCC plc is a leading international sales, marketing, and support services group operating across three core sectors: DCC Energy, DCC Healthcare, and DCC Technology. Headquartered in Dublin, Ireland, and listed on the London Stock Exchange, the company provides solutions for energy transition, healthcare products and services, and consumer and business technology. DCC operates in over 20 countries, delivering sustainable growth and value through a disciplined capital allocation strategy and decentralized management model.
